CustomField.formula: CASE( (ScoreCardMatrix__r.Criteria_Fields__c), "ED Volume", ScoreCardMatrix__r.WEIGHTED_CONSTANTS_C__c * Score__c, "Phy in State (EM, FP, or IM)", ScoreCardMatrix__r.WEIGHTED_CONSTANTS_C__c * Score__c, "Hospital Service Area HH Inco", ScoreCardMatrix__r.WEIGHTED_CONSTANTS_C__c * Score__c, "Population Size of Svc Area", ScoreCardMatrix__r.WEIGHTED_CONSTANTS_C__c * Score__c, "Ownership/Geography", ScoreCardMatrix__r.WEIGHTED_CONSTANTS_C__c * Score__c, "CBSA Classification", ScoreCardMatrix__r.WEIGHTED_CONSTANTS_C__c * Score__c, "Proximity to SG ED Client", ScoreCardMatrix__r.WEIGHTED_CONSTANTS_C__c * Score__c, "Managed Care Favorability", ScoreCardMatrix__r.WEIGHTED_CONSTANTS_C__c * Score__c, "SG Favorability", ScoreCardMatrix__r.WEIGHTED_CONSTANTS_C__c * Score__c, "Net Operating Profit Margin", ScoreCardMatrix__r.WEIGHTED_CONSTANTS_C__c * Score__c, "Staffed Beds", ScoreCardMatrix__r.WEIGHTED_CONSTANTS_C__c * Score__c, 0)
CustomField.label: Weighted Score
